sections.heading: Before you apply
items: Answer a few questions and we’ll tell you what you need to travel to Canada: an electronic travel authorization (eTA) or a visa.

sections.heading: Check if you need an eTA or visa
Apply for a visitor visa or eTA
Visitor visa
items: What is a visitor visa, who can apply, how to apply and how to prepare for your arrival in Canada

sections.heading: Electronic travel authorization (eTA)
items: What is an eTA, who can apply, how to apply and how to prepare for your arrival in Canada

sections.heading: Visitor records: extend your stay as a visitor
items: Who can get a visitor record, what it is and how to apply

sections.heading: Students and workers: apply for a new visitor visa
items: Get a new visitor visa from inside Canada if yours is expired and you’re planning on leaving Canada and returning

sections.heading: For Canadian business and event organizers
Bring foreign business guests to Canada
items: What you need to do as a business or event organizer, how to register your event and prepare letters of invitation

sections.heading: Border information for visitors to Canada
items: Travel tips, what happens at the border and prohibited or restricted goods

sections.heading: Explore immigration programs
items: Answer a few questions to see different ways you might be able to come to Canada
